home.description: Over 7 years of experience in end-to-end solutions. I currently build Angular micro frontends for compliance; I also ship premium interfaces and .NET architectures when the product needs it.

experience.title: The core of my work.
experience.subtitle: Full mastery of the development cycle, from robust databases to production-grade user experiences.
experience.backendDesc: For a UI to work flawlessly, it needs a solid core. I design and build scalable architectures, microservices, and high-performance RESTful APIs in .NET and Node.js. Deep expertise in database optimization and complex data modeling.
experience.frontendDesc: SPAs and micro frontends with Angular 17+ (Signals, Module Federation) and React. Visual craft, fluid motion, and product-focused UX in enterprise environments.

about.description: I am a Software Developer with over 7 years of experience designing tech solutions for the banking sector, multinational companies, and startups. My passion is to create interfaces that not only look spectacular and professional but also offer real solutions to the business. I meticulously take care of every visual and functional detail of the user experience, and I use my strong Backend capabilities to build the architecture, APIs, and databases that support these interfaces, delivering a comprehensive, robust, and ready-to-scale product.
